[Question]
"Was the hamper big enough to fit a scarf inside?"

')." Output the probability as a decimal rounded to two decimal places.
```python
from scipy.stats import norm

# Given values
mean = 50  # mean height of adult males in inches
std_dev = 3  # standard deviation of height of adult males in inches
scarf_length = 48 / 12  # convert scarf length to feet

# Calculate z-score
z_score = (scarf_length - mean) / std_dev

# Calculate probability using cumulative distribution function (CDF)
probability = norm.cdf(z_score)

# Round to two decimal places
rounded_probability = round(probability, 2)

rounded_probability
```
```output
Done
```
